name: VoxCPM
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        OpenBMB /

      VoxCPM  

    
      VoxCPM2: Tokenizer-Free TTS for Multilingual Speech Generation, Creative Voice Design, and True-to-Life Cloning
summary: VoxCPM是一个支持多语言语音生成、创意声音设计和逼真语音克隆的无分词器文本转语音系统，其创新技术值得关注。

name: train-llm-from-scratch
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        FareedKhan-dev /

      train-llm-from-scratch  

    
      A straightforward method for training your LLM, from downloading data to generating text.
summary: 该项目提供了一个从零开始训练大型语言模型的简明教程，涵盖数据下载到文本生成的全流程，适合想深入了解LLM训练过程的开发者。

name: claude-code
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        anthropics /

      claude-code  

    
      Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.
summary: Claude Code 是一个基于终端的智能编码助手，能理解代码库并通过自然语言命令执行任务、解释复杂代码及处理 Git 工作流，显著提升开发效率。

name: MoneyPrinterTurbo
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        harry0703 /

      MoneyPrinterTurbo  

    
      利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.
summary: 该项目利用AI大模型一键生成高清短视频，简化了视频制作流程，值得关注因为它大幅降低了短视频创作的技术门槛。

name: D4Vinci
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        D4Vinci /

      Scrapling  

    
      🕷️ An adaptive Web Scraping framework that handles everything from a single request to a full-scale crawl!
summary: 该项目是一个自适应的网络爬虫框架，能够处理从单个请求到大规模爬取的所有任务，值得关注因其灵活性和强大的扩展能力。

name: harness
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        revfactory /

      harness  

    
      A meta-skill that designs domain-specific agent teams, defines specialized agents, and generates the skills they use.
summary: 该项目是一个设计领域特定智能体团队、定义专业代理并生成其使用技能的元技能框架，值得关注因其能高效构建和优化多智能体协作系统。

name: supermemory
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        supermemoryai /

      supermemory  

    
      Memory engine and app that is extremely fast, scalable. The Memory API for the AI era.
summary: Supermemory 是一个极速、可扩展的记忆引擎和应用，为 AI 时代提供记忆 API。

name: build-your-own-x
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        codecrafters-io /

      build-your-own-x  

    
      Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.
summary: 该项目提供了一系列教程，指导开发者从零开始重建各种流行技术，帮助深入理解编程原理，值得关注因其实践性强且涵盖广泛技术领域。
